data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the pricing differences based on location. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this pricing structure is implemented or functioning as required. This indicates a gap in the validation process for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of location-specific pricing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract for pricing validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify location-specific pricing.
